case_title: WIRTUAL KITCHEN LLC VS. CARMEN FLETCHER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIRTUAL KITCHEN LLC

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ELLEN RAYZ, PARTNER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIRTUAL KITCHEN LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$80.00) SERVED MAR-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER, CARMEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GREY STROM, PARTNER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIRTUAL KITCHEN LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIRTUAL KITCHEN LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-08-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS FOR WIRTUAL KITCHEN LLC ARE PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GREG STROM, PARTNER AND ELLEN REYZ, PARTNER. DEFENDANT CARMEN FLETCHER IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. ALL PARTIES ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM. THE DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $5000 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN MONTHLY PAYMENTS. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE ON APRIL 28, 2023, AND THEREAFTER ON THE 28TH OF EACH MONTH FOR 10 MONTHS, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF JAN-28-2024. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEPTEMBER 08TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR A FINAL PROGRESS REPORT DATE IN FEB 2024, AND IF NO APPEARANCE AT THAT DATE THE CASES WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF VIRTUAL KITHCEN LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARMEN FLETCHER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PER AGREEMENT REACHED IN COURT ON 4/27/23 AND NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES, THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2023 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-27-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WIRTUAL KITCHEN LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GREY STROM (PARTNER) AND ELLEN RAYZ (PARTNER). DEFENDANT CARMEN FLETCHER IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE BY PERSONAL SERVICE INDICATE CLAIM WAS SERVED ON MARCH 8, 2023 BUT IT HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED TO FILE 5 DAYS PRIOR TO THE COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE WITH THE FILING OFFICE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE. CASE IS CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE AND FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE AND FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-28-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
